title: epipactis × liestalensis
intro: Epipactis × liestalensis, also known as the Liestal helleborine, is a hybrid orchid species derived from the cross between Epipactis helleborine and Epipactis microphylla. It is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of iridoid glycosides, which have been shown to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Epipactis × liestalensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and exhibit antioxidant properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
